title: Pokopia Scanner
description: Web-based progress scanner for Pokémon Pokopia. Upload Switch video recordings, OCR-scan items/Pokémon/habitats/recipes, track collection progress, and export structured JSON. Deployed on GitHub Pages.
instructions:
# Pokopia Progress Scanner

You are working on the **Pokopia Progress Scanner**, a React web application that scans Nintendo Switch video recordings to track collection progress in Pokémon Pokopia.

## Project Overview
- **Tech Stack**: Vite + React 18 + Tesseract.js v5
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dmnkhorvath/Pokopiascanner
- **Live Site**: https://dmnkhorvath.github.io/Pokopiascanner/
- **Deployment**: GitHub Actions → GitHub Pages (auto-deploy on push to main)

## Architecture
- **LandingPage** — Drag-and-drop video upload, settings config, import/export
- **VideoScanner** — Core OCR engine with live frame preview & detection feed
- **ScanResults** — Category tabs, search, grid/list view, export/import
- **ocrEngine** (utils) — Frame extraction, preprocessing, Tesseract.js OCR pipeline
- **fuzzyMatch** (utils) — Levenshtein distance fuzzy matching with pre-built lookup

## OCR Pipeline
Video Upload → Extract Frames → Crop Region → B&W Preprocessing → Tesseract.js OCR → Exact Match → Fuzzy Match Fallback → Categorize Results

## Dataset
- **pokopiaDataset.json** — Full dataset with metadata (300 Pokémon, 1254 Items, 209 Habitats, 743 Recipes)
- **ocrLookup.json** — OCR lookup dictionary mapping item names to type/category
- Data scraped from https://pokopiadex.com/

## Key Features
- Video upload with drag-and-drop
- Configurable settings (frame skip, crop region, OCR confidence, fuzzy tolerance)
- Real-time scanning with live preview
- Category tabs with progress bars
- Grid/List view with search/filter
- JSON export/import with merge capability
- Pokopia-themed UI (orange/green/blue color scheme)

## Git Workflow
- Always commit with conventional commit messages (feat:, fix:, style:, ci:, etc.)
- Push to main triggers auto-deployment to GitHub Pages
- Use GH_ACCESS_TOKEN for push authentication

## Development
```bash
npm run dev    # Development server
npm run build  # Production build
```

## Future Improvements
- Fine-tune crop regions once actual Pokopia gameplay video is available
- Add image recognition as alternative/complement to OCR
- Add localStorage persistence for scan history
- Add comparison/diff between scans
